pairings.name: pairing-newspaper
pairings.title: Newspaper — Playfair Display + DM Sans + JetBrains Mono
pairings.description: High-contrast editorial with a modern twist. Playfair's sharp serifs cut through DM Sans's soft geometry, creating a sophisticated tension between tradition and modernity.

pairings.name: pairing-manifesto
pairings.title: Manifesto — Roboto Slab + Roboto + Roboto Mono
pairings.description: The complete Roboto system. Slab headlines bring gravitas to Google's most versatile typeface family. A three-weight system that works everywhere, from Android to enterprise dashboards.

pairings.name: pairing-headline
pairings.title: Headline — Anton + Work Sans + Roboto Mono
pairings.description: Bold and unapologetic. Anton's narrow, impactful letterforms dominate the viewport, while Work Sans's humanist warmth grounds the reading experience in comfortable body text.

pairings.name: pairing-minimal
pairings.title: Minimal — Geist + Geist + Geist Mono
pairings.description: Ultra-minimal Vercel-style pairing. One font family for everything, clean and modern.

pairings.name: pairing-fintech
pairings.title: Fintech — Outfit + IBM Plex Sans + IBM Plex Mono
pairings.description: Trust through typography. Outfit's geometric clarity inspires confidence in headings, while IBM Plex's rigorous design system ensures readability in data-heavy financial interfaces.

pairings.name: pairing-classic
pairings.title: Classic — DM Serif Display + Libre Baskerville + JetBrains Mono
pairings.description: Literary and warm serif pairing. Elegant display headings with classic body text for publishing.

pairings.name: pairing-memoir
pairings.title: Memoir — Bitter + Lora + Inconsolata
pairings.description: Two screen-first serifs in harmony. Bitter's sturdy slab headlines ground the page, while Lora's calligraphic curves make every paragraph feel like turning a page in a favorite book.

pairings.name: pairing-broadsheet
pairings.title: Broadsheet — PT Serif + PT Sans + Inconsolata
pairings.description: Russia's gift to web typography. ParaType's public text fonts — commissioned for pan-Russian readability — pair beautifully: serif headlines carry authority, sans body text ensures clarity across Cyrillic and Latin.

pairings.name: pairing-startup
pairings.title: Startup — Nunito + Nunito Sans + Fira Code
pairings.description: Friendly and approachable. Nunito's rounded terminals give headings warmth, while Nunito Sans straightens out for professional body text. The family that grows with your product.

pairings.name: pairing-architect
pairings.title: Architect — Outfit + Libre Baskerville + IBM Plex Mono
pairings.description: Structured meets refined. Outfit's geometric precision in headings contrasts beautifully with Libre Baskerville's warm readability, like blueprints meeting handwritten notes.

pairings.name: pairing-venture
pairings.title: Venture — Jost + Rubik + Roboto Mono
pairings.description: Futura-inspired ambition. Jost channels Paul Renner's geometric ideals for commanding headlines, softened by Rubik's slightly rounded sans-serif that adds just enough warmth for comfortable reading.

pairings.name: pairing-health
pairings.title: Health — Figtree + Overpass + Inconsolata
pairings.description: Calm and clear. Figtree's friendly geometry in headings paired with Overpass's Highway Gothic roots — designed to be read at speed. Perfect for interfaces where clarity saves lives.

pairings.name: pairing-playful
pairings.title: Playful — Quicksand + Cabin + Inconsolata
pairings.description: Rounded and inviting. Quicksand's perfectly circular counters give headings a toy-like friendliness, while Cabin's humanist proportions keep body text grounded and professional.

pairings.name: pairing-storyteller
pairings.title: Storyteller — Lora + Nunito Sans + Inconsolata
pairings.description: Warm and inviting. Lora's brushed curves bring narrative warmth to headlines, while Nunito Sans's rounded terminals keep body text approachable and easy to scan.

pairings.name: pairing-handbook
pairings.title: Handbook — Lexend + Lexend + Inconsolata
pairings.description: Designed for readability research. Lexend's variable font axes were fine-tuned through scientific studies to reduce visual noise and increase reading proficiency.

pairings.name: pairing-scholar
pairings.title: Scholar — EB Garamond + Inter + Source Code Pro
pairings.description: Academic precision meets digital clarity. EB Garamond's renaissance roots lend authority to headings, while Inter ensures perfect screen readability for long-form content.

pairings.name: pairing-saas
pairings.title: Saas — Urbanist + Libre Franklin + JetBrains Mono
pairings.description: SaaS-native typography. Urbanist's low-contrast geometric forms feel at home in navigation and pricing, while Libre Franklin's newsprint heritage makes feature descriptions feel trustworthy.

pairings.name: pairing-social
pairings.title: Social — Poppins + Hind + Roboto Mono
pairings.description: Global-ready friendliness. Poppins brings Indian Type Foundry's geometric warmth to headlines, while Hind's Devanagari-first design ensures beautiful rendering across Latin and Indic scripts.

pairings.name: pairing-commons
pairings.title: Commons — Cabin + Mukta + Fira Code
pairings.description: Humanist warmth across scripts. Cabin's slightly condensed forms give headings a distinct character, while Mukta — designed for both Devanagari and Latin — brings inclusive readability to body text.

pairings.name: pairing-dispatch
pairings.title: Dispatch — Heebo + Assistant + Source Code Pro
pairings.description: Hebrew-Latin harmony. Heebo's geometric forms designed for both scripts create inclusive headlines, while Assistant — with similar dual-script DNA — maintains that consistency through body text.

pairings.name: pairing-devtool
pairings.title: Devtool — Red Hat Display + Red Hat Display + Fira Code
pairings.description: Open-source identity. Red Hat Display balances geometric precision with humanist warmth, creating a type system that feels both technical and approachable — exactly what developer tools need.

pairings.name: pairing-thesis
pairings.title: Thesis — Noto Serif + Noto Sans + Inconsolata
pairings.description: The universal pairing. Noto's unified design system ensures consistent rendering across every language and script. Truly global typography with no tofu.

pairings.name: pairing-studio
pairings.title: Studio — Bricolage Grotesque + Figtree + Fira Code
pairings.description: Design-forward pairing. Bricolage Grotesque's distinctive ink traps and angular terminals command attention, softened by Figtree's friendly geometric body text.

pairings.name: pairing-folio
pairings.title: Folio — Josefin Sans + Raleway + Roboto Mono
pairings.description: Vintage geometry meets modern elegance. Josefin Sans's 1920s-inspired letterforms create distinctive headlines, while Raleway's refined thin weights bring fashion-forward sophistication to body text.

pairings.name: pairing-dashboard
pairings.title: Dashboard — Manrope + DM Sans + Fira Code
pairings.description: Data-driven clarity. Manrope's optical corrections make dense dashboards legible, while DM Sans handles labels and descriptions with compact efficiency.

pairings.name: pairing-gazette
pairings.title: Gazette — Cormorant Garamond + Raleway + Roboto Mono
pairings.description: Old-world elegance meets contemporary grace. Cormorant Garamond's delicate high-contrast strokes create dramatic headlines, balanced by Raleway's geometric sophistication.

pairings.name: pairing-document
pairings.title: Document — Source Sans 3 + Source Sans 3 + Source Code Pro
pairings.description: Adobe's open-source superfamily. Source Sans 3's humanist proportions excel in UI and documents alike, with Source Code Pro maintaining the same vertical metrics for seamless mixed content.

pairings.name: pairing-journal
pairings.title: Journal — Merriweather + Mulish + Source Code Pro
pairings.description: Purpose-built for reading. Merriweather's sturdy serifs hold up at any size, paired with Mulish's neutral warmth for body text that keeps readers engaged paragraph after paragraph.

pairings.name: pairing-swiss
pairings.title: Swiss — Inter Tight + Open Sans + IBM Plex Mono
pairings.description: Neo-grotesque precision. Inter Tight's condensed proportions pack more information into headlines without sacrificing legibility, while Open Sans provides the reliable body text that 40% of the web already trusts.

pairings.name: pairing-capsule
pairings.title: Capsule — Montserrat + Karla + JetBrains Mono
pairings.description: Buenos Aires modernism. Montserrat channels the urban signage of its namesake neighborhood — bold, geometric, unmistakable. Karla's grotesque quirks keep body text from feeling clinical.

pairings.name: pairing-corporate
pairings.title: Corporate — Roboto + Roboto + Roboto Mono
pairings.description: Google's type system. Roboto's dual nature — mechanical skeleton with friendly curves — creates a cohesive experience from headlines to fine print. The de facto standard for Material Design.

pairings.name: pairing-brutalist
pairings.title: Brutalist — Archivo Black + Archivo + Source Code Pro
pairings.description: Raw typographic power. Archivo Black's heavy weight fills every pixel of the headline, while regular Archivo maintains the same DNA in a readable body weight. No decoration, pure function.

pairings.name: pairing-impact
pairings.title: Impact — Fjalla One + Josefin Sans + Fira Code
pairings.description: Condensed power meets art deco elegance. Fjalla One's Nordic condensed forms dominate the headline, while Josefin Sans's vintage geometric proportions add character to every paragraph.

pairings.name: pairing-creative
pairings.title: Creative — Space Grotesk + DM Sans + Fira Code
pairings.description: Playful geometric pairing. Bold headings with friendly body text for startups and portfolios.

pairings.name: pairing-dossier
pairings.title: Dossier — Barlow Condensed + Barlow + IBM Plex Mono
pairings.description: California grotesk in two widths. Barlow Condensed packs maximum information into headlines, while regular Barlow breathes in body text. A superfamily designed for screen-first interfaces.

pairings.name: pairing-protocol
pairings.title: Protocol — Saira + Ubuntu + IBM Plex Mono
pairings.description: Racing DNA meets open-source philosophy. Saira's motorsport-inspired geometry powers through headlines, while Ubuntu's distinctive humanist forms — Canonical's signature typeface — make body text unmistakably modern.

pairings.name: pairing-beacon
pairings.title: Beacon — Exo 2 + Titillium Web + Source Code Pro
pairings.description: Space-age geometry. Exo 2's futuristic proportions make headlines feel like mission control, while Titillium Web's Italian polytechnic origins keep body text grounded in engineering precision.

pairings.name: pairing-editorial
pairings.title: Editorial — Playfair Display + Source Serif 4 + JetBrains Mono
pairings.description: Classic editorial pairing. High-contrast serif headings with readable serif body text.

pairings.name: pairing-launch
pairings.title: Launch — Sora + Public Sans + Fira Code
pairings.description: Launch-ready confidence. Sora's geometric precision with optical adjustments makes bold headlines pop, while Public Sans — born from US government accessibility standards — ensures every word lands clearly.

pairings.name: pairing-product
pairings.title: Product — Plus Jakarta Sans + Inter + JetBrains Mono
pairings.description: Product-focused clarity. Jakarta's slightly warmer geometry gives headings personality without the noise, while Inter handles the fine print with surgical precision.

pairings.name: pairing-agency
pairings.title: Agency — Schibsted Grotesk + Karla + Fira Code
pairings.description: Nordic minimalism meets grotesque warmth. Schibsted Grotesk's Scandinavian clarity in headlines paired with Karla's quirky grotesque personality for body text that feels human.

pairings.name: pairing-technical
pairings.title: Technical — IBM Plex Sans + IBM Plex Sans + IBM Plex Mono
pairings.description: Professional IBM Plex family pairing. Designed for documentation and enterprise applications.

pairings.name: pairing-govtech
pairings.title: Govtech — Public Sans + Lato + Source Code Pro
pairings.description: Government-grade clarity. Public Sans was designed for the US Web Design System — strong, neutral, and accessible. Paired with Lato's warm humanist body text for approachable civic interfaces.

pairings.name: pairing-curator
pairings.title: Curator — Plus Jakarta Sans + PT Serif + Source Code Pro
pairings.description: Contemporary curation. Plus Jakarta Sans brings Indonesian design heritage to bold headings, while PT Serif delivers ParaType's exceptional Cyrillic and Latin body text.

pairings.name: pairing-poster
pairings.title: Poster — Oswald + Barlow + Inconsolata
pairings.description: Condensed impact. Oswald's tall proportions make every headline a statement, balanced by Barlow's slightly rounded sans-serif that adds approachability to the mechanical strength.

pairings.name: pairing-literary
pairings.title: Literary — EB Garamond + Crimson Text + Inconsolata
pairings.description: Pure literary elegance. Two old-style serifs in conversation — Garamond's refined Renaissance forms meet Crimson's contemporary interpretation, creating a scholarly harmony.

pairings.name: pairing-novel
pairings.title: Novel — Cormorant Garamond + Lora + JetBrains Mono
pairings.description: For stories worth telling. Cormorant's dramatic display weight arrests attention at the chapter level, while Lora's brush-inspired curves make each paragraph a pleasure to read.

pairings.name: pairing-digest
pairings.title: Digest — Bitter + Open Sans + Source Code Pro
pairings.description: Slab-serif substance. Bitter's sturdy slab serifs were designed specifically for screen reading, making headlines feel anchored and authoritative. Open Sans handles the body with effortless neutrality.

pairings.name: pairing-modern-clean
pairings.title: Modern Clean — Inter + Inter + Geist Mono
pairings.description: Clean and neutral sans-serif pairing. Perfect for SaaS dashboards and web applications.
